contentList.content: The mysterious shadar-kai venture into the Material Plane from the Shadowfell to advance the Raven Queen's will. Once they were fey like the rest of their elven kin, and now they exist in a strange state between life and death.

The mysterious shadar-kai venture into the Material Plane from the Shadowfell to advance the Raven Queen's will. Once they were fey like the rest of their elven kin, and now they exist in a strange state between life and death.
These elves were transformed by the Shadowfell, and now they exist in a strange state between life and death.
These elves were transformed by the Shadowfell, and now they exist in a strange state between life and death.
The Raven Queen is a being of dark mystery, ruling from the Fortress of Memories in the Shadowfell.
The Raven Queen is a being of dark mystery, ruling from the Fortress of Memories in the Shadowfell.
The Raven Queen is a being of dark mystery, ruling from the Fortress of Memories in the Shadowfell.
Straight from the frontier of worlds unkonwn.
After casting <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_BlessingRavenQueen">Blessing of the Raven Queen</LSTag>, you have <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to all damage until your next turn.
After casting <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_BlessingRavenQueen">Blessing of the Raven Queen</LSTag>, you have <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to all damage until your next turn.
You have <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistance</LSTag> to Necrotic damage.
You can magically teleport to an unoccupied space you can see within range.
Call for aid from your raven guide.
Call for aid from your raven guide.
